cards.title: CBC Overview
cards._legacyHtml:
CBC ReferenceNormal ranges: Hb M 13–17 g/dL, F 12–15 g/dL · WBC 4–11 ×10³/µL · Platelets 150–400 ×10³/µL

↑ WBC: Infection, inflammation, leukaemia | ↓ WBC: Viral, aplastic anaemia, chemotherapy

cards.title: Anaemia Workup
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Iron studies (Serum Fe, TIBC, Ferritin)
  • Peripheral smear morphology
  • Reticulocyte count
  • B12/Folate levels

cards.title: LFT Interpretation
cards._legacyHtml: LFT RangesALT/AST <40 U/L · Bilirubin <1.2 mg/dL · ALP 44–147 U/L · Albumin 3.5–5 g/dL

cards.title: Renal Function Panel
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Urea 7–20 mg/dL
  • Creatinine M 0.7–1.3, F 0.5–1.1 mg/dL
  • eGFR calculation (CKD-EPI)
  • Electrolytes: Na/K/Cl/HCO3

cards.title: Urine Analysis
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Dipstick interpretation
  • Microscopy findings
  • Protein/creatinine ratio
  • Culture & sensitivity

cards.title: Lipid Profile
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • TC <200 mg/dL · LDL <100 mg/dL
  • HDL M >40, F >50 mg/dL
  • Triglycerides <150 mg/dL
  • Non-HDL cholesterol target

cards.title: Glucose & HbA1c
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • FBS 70–100 mg/dL · PPBS <140 mg/dL
  • HbA1c: Normal <5.7%, Pre-DM 5.7–6.4%
  • OGTT criteria
  • Insulin resistance markers

cards.title: Bone Profile
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Calcium 8.5–10.5 mg/dL
  • Phosphorus 2.5–4.5 mg/dL
  • ALP (bone isoform)
  • Vitamin D: 25-OH-D3 optimal 40–60 ng/mL

cards.title: CSF Analysis
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Glucose (CSF:serum ratio)
  • Protein 15–45 mg/dL
  • Cell count: <5 cells/µL
  • Opening pressure 80–180 mmH2O

cards.title: Tumour Markers
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • PSA, CA-125, CA 19-9, CEA
  • AFP, β-hCG, LDH
  • Clinical context essential
  • Not for screening in low-risk

cards.title: ABG Interpretation
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • pH 7.35–7.45
  • PaO2 80–100 mmHg · PaCO2 35–45
  • HCO3 22–26 mEq/L
  • Step-wise acid-base approach

cards.title: Coagulation Profile
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • PT/INR · aPTT · Fibrinogen
  • D-dimer, Anti-Xa levels
  • Bleeding time, Clot retraction
  • Thromboelastography (TEG)

cards.title: Cardiac Markers
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Troponin I/T — high sensitivity
  • CK-MB kinetics
  • BNP / NT-proBNP
  • CRP & ESR in cardiac context

cards.title: Immunology Panel
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • ANA, Anti-dsDNA, Anti-Sm
  • RF, Anti-CCP · ANCA
  • Complement C3/C4
  • Immunoglobulins IgG/IgA/IgM

cards.title: Hormone Panel
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • TSH 0.4–4.0 mIU/L · Free T3/T4
  • FSH/LH/Prolactin/Oestradiol
  • Testosterone (total & free)
  • Cortisol (morning) 6–23 µg/dL

cards.title: Drug Monitoring
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Digoxin, Lithium, Phenytoin ranges
  • Therapeutic windows
  • Sampling time rules
  • Toxicity signs by drug

cards.title: Critical Values
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Na <120 or >160 mEq/L
  • K <2.5 or >6.5 mEq/L
  • Glucose <40 or >500 mg/dL
  • Immediate action required

cards.title: Lab Patterns
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Hepatitis pattern vs NAFLD
  • Iron deficiency vs ACD
  • Nephrotic vs nephritic
  • Hypothyroid vs hyperthyroid pattern

cards.title: Mnemonics
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • MUDPILES (high anion gap causes)
  • SALT (metabolic alkalosis)
  • ROME (acid-base)
  • TICS (causes of lymphocytosis
